summary: Iteration 35: Phase A New Case Workflow - Photo Upload & Phase Transitions - All 14 backend tests PASSED (100%)

minor.issue: This endpoint does not exist. The actual endpoints are GET /api/photo-steps/{phase} and GET /api/photo-steps (global). The main agent may need to update the frontend to use the correct endpoint if not already done.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend is React Native/Expo - browser testing skipped per request

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: POST /api/procedures creates case in 'draft' status correctly
Backend: POST /api/procedures/{id}/implant-plan saves implant plans with validation (1-6 implants, unique positions)
Backend: GET /api/photo-steps/{phase} returns phase-specific photo steps with all required fields (id, label, category, purpose, armamentarium, prompt)
Backend: GET /api/photo-steps returns all photo steps for all 4 phases
Backend: POST /api/procedures/{id}/photos/{step_id} uploads photos with multipart/form-data, validates step_id and file type
Backend: GET /api/procedures/{id}/photos returns photos grouped by phase with completion tracking
Backend: POST /api/procedures/{id}/request-phase1-approval correctly transitions draft to pending_phase1
Backend: Photo upload correctly validates file extensions (.png, .jpg, .jpeg, .heif, .heic) and rejects invalid types
Backend: Implant plan correctly rejects duplicate tooth positions
Backend: PHOTO_STEPS configuration (lines 869-950) contains comprehensive step definitions for all 4 phases

success_rate.frontend: N/A (React Native/Expo - browser testing skipped per request)

seed_data_creation: Test procedures created with 'TEST_' prefix during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo workflow Phase A features fully tested. All endpoints working: POST /api/procedures (draft status), POST /api/procedures/{id}/implant-plan (save implants), GET /api/photo-steps/{phase} and /api/photo-steps (get photo step definitions), POST /api/procedures/{id}/photos/{step_id} (upload photos), GET /api/procedures/{id}/photos (get photos grouped by phase), POST /api/procedures/{id}/request-phase1-approval (draft to pending_phase1 transition). Note: Photo upload expects multipart/form-data with 'file' field. Procedure creation requires weekday dates (no Sundays, Saturdays only at 10:00 AM).
